source: Synthetic — patterned on real Pike13 multi-class confirmations the user receives (donotreply@pike13.com). No single real email surfaced with multiple events in one message during the inbox search; this fixture is hand-crafted to mirror the actual data shape.

input.subject: Weekly Schedule Reminder: Madi has 2 classes this week at The World of Music
input.bodyTruncated: The World of Music School Weekly Reminder. Madi is scheduled for the following classes this week: 1) Guitar Class (Step Up) on Wed, May 27 at 6:00 PM at The World of Music Four Corners. 2) Piano Class on Wed, May 27 at 7:00 PM at The World of Music Four Corners. Cancellation policy: 24 hours notice required. The World of Music Four Corners, 17500 US-27, Clermont, FL 34715.

events.title: Guitar Class — Madi
events.location: The World of Music Four Corners, 17500 US-27, Clermont, FL 34715

events.title: Piano Class — Madi
events.location: The World of Music Four Corners, 17500 US-27, Clermont, FL 34715

notes: Multi-event email — two distinct events in a single message. Per AI-SPEC §1b and CONTEXT.md, v1.1 extracts only ONE event per message (the first / most prominent). The eval's success criterion is that the extractor picks ONE plausible event (either Guitar or Piano) with the correct time + location, NOT both. This is a regression guard against the extractor inventing combined or hallucinated events.
